title: Chewllagen Beef Mini Roll 5" 10mm (Pack of 3 x 5-15 Total) Healthy Choice Dog Chew and Treat
features: Collagen is the most abundant protein in the body and has many important functions, including the growth and repair of bones, tendons, ligaments, skin, and fur. As animals age, they produce less and lower-quality collagen.

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED – At Maltbys Stores, we're a family of dog lovers (which is why we all have dogs ourselves!) so we know when it comes to finding treats for your own furry friends, you're looking for something that's not only great tasting but also helps to promote your pet's health and wellbeing. Choosing natural treats is a great choice for your dog as they are generally lower in fat and higher in protein than most processed dog treats, and what’s more, dogs love them too!

100% NATURAL – All of our dog treats are kept in their entirely natural form, with absolutely no added colours, flavours or preservatives that might not be so good for your dog's digestion. They are all air-dried from raw to retain their vital nutrients and, most importantly for your dog, their delicious smells and flavours too!

QUALITY WE ARE PROUD OF - Maltby's have been a family run business since 1904, and during that time we have always tried to provide our customers with the best quality products for their pets at the fairest prices. So whether you're little loved ones happen to have fur, feathers, or even scales, we're bound to have something for you! Visit our Ebay store to browse our full range of products, or feel free to contact us if you have any questions we can answer

PLEASE NOTE: This product has been packaged and stored in a facility where it may have come into contact with common allergens, including peanuts, milk, egg, wheat and fish products. This is a supplementary animal food product, intended to be used as part of a balanced diet. Maltbys Stores 1904 Ltd do not sell any products that are intended for human consumption.
description: Product description Chewllagen is a dog chew treat made from the collagen extracted from South American grass-fed cattle hide. The collagen proteins are hydrolysed and broken down through a heating process into smaller and more easily digestible molecules. The collagen is then shaped and baked where it acquires its bread-like texture before being dipped in real beef. Collagen is the most abundant protein in the body and has many important functions, including the growth and repair of bones, tendons, ligaments, skin, and fur. As animals age, they produce less and lower-quality collagen. Consisting of mainly type 1 and type 3 collagen, Chewllagen stimulates cartilage production, cushioning joints and reducing joint pain. Not only does it aid your dog’s recovery after a long walk but also improves their muscular strength and power. In addition, Chewllagen also improves the gut health of your dog making it The Healthy Choice for your four-legged friend. Chewllagen is a great quick reward for all dogs, no matter their size or age, and is suitable suitable for young puppies (over 14 weeks) up to senior dogs. Indications Puppy, Adult, Senior Ingredients As per listing Directions use as required as a treat See more
